content.title: 1. Account and Login
content.text: Your account details and credentials must be kept confidential. You are solely responsible for all activities conducted under your user credentials.

content.title: 2. User Data and Platform Conduct
content.text: WorkQuora collects and stores your profile information, job postings, proposals, transactions, and location data to offer marketplace services according to our platform privacy policies.

content.title: 3. Marketplace Escrow and Wallet Rules
content.text: Payments, escrow administration, wallet balances, dispute resolutions, and platform commissions follow direct operational rules outlined on the platform. All users agree to abide by these guidelines.
